appliesTo.question: What impacts do data centers have on the communities and environment around them?

criteria.notes: The report directly covers grid, greenhouse-gas, water, land/material, local pollution, community cost, environmental-justice, benefit, and mitigation impacts.
The report is concise and readable; its terse style reflects deterministic factual sentences bound to admitted evidence.
The bundle preserves harms, economic benefits, counterarguments, climate-accounting dissent, unresolved gaps, and explicit limitations.
The sections map to the charter topics, and cited factual sentences traverse claim IDs to exact locators and immutable live snapshots.
Mitigation options include cooling choices, hourly clean-energy procurement, demand flexibility, large-load tariffs, cumulative-impact permitting, and community-benefit agreements.
The bundle records the stop reason, two-cycle decision trail, contradiction entry, limitations, zero rejected residue, costs, and provider identity.

notes: No factual sentence was added, removed, or rewritten by this review.
This review applies to the separate Brave-backed live bundle preserved outside research/data-center-impacts.
Secret leakage audit found no Brave API key value in the reviewed bundle.
